name: Amocha Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot coffee over finely chopped nuts and let cool.
2. Add cocoa powder to the cooled mixture.
3. Beat egg whites with salt until they form soft peaks.
4. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Beat yolks in a separate bowl until thick.
6. Combine the yolk mixture with the remaining sugar until thickened.
7. Add the cooled coffee and nut mixture, blending well.
8. Sift together cake meal and potato starch, then add to the batter and blend thoroughly.
9. Gently fold the batter into the beaten egg whites.
10. Pour the batter into a tube pan lined with parchment paper.
11. Bake in an oven preheated to 325°F (163°C) for 1 hour or longer until set.
